name: secretbank
description: Dependency-graph-aware secrets manager with supply-chain risk detection — list / reveal credentials and scan dependencies for known secret-exfil history without leaving your editor.

commands.title: Secretbank: Scan workspace for supply-chain risk

languageModelTools.name: Secretbank_list_credentials
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List credentials stored in the user's Secretbank — returns id / issuer / name / env / status. Does NOT reveal secret values. Use this to discover what secrets are available so you can ask the user about a specific one. Read-only.

languageModelTools.name: Secretbank_scan_supply_chain
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Scan the user's current workspace for npm / Cargo dependencies that have a known OSV.dev advisory (especially secret_leak / supply_chain category). Use BEFORE adding or upgrading a dependency — if a package has secret-exfil history, surface that to the user. Read-only.

category_filter.description: Restrict to a specific advisory category. 'any' returns all (default).

Secretbank.cliPath.description: Path to the `Secretbank` CLI binary. Leave as `Secretbank` if it is on your PATH.

Secretbank.scanOnStartup.description: Run a supply-chain scan when the workspace opens.
